title: NoMorePainfulPearls
body:
# NMPP (NoMorePainfulPearls)
Makes pearls less painful by removing the damage that occurs when an ender pearl lands.
This is a simple, one mixin mod. Source code can be found [here](https://github.com/ExoPlant/NMPP)


Get a server from [BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/froga) with 25% off your first month with code FROGA!
If you use this link (https://bisecthosting.com/froga), it supports me!
So please, if you enjoy my mods, please buy a server from BisectHosting using my link to support me so I can continue to make mods!
